job_amazon.title: Software Engineer
job_amazon.description: Working on Optical Inter Satellite Links at Amazon Leo
bullets: Developed real-time embedded software in Rust for distributed control systems on bare-metal FreeRTOS, focused on scalable logging and telemetry infrastructure for hardware monitoring and runtime system behavior
Built hardware-in-the-loop (HIL) automation frameworks in Python to validate firmware behavior against physical test environments
Developed internal CI/CD and deployment infrastructure using AWS services (S3, Lambda, CloudFormation) and TypeScript to automate build, test, and release workflows

job_ga_1.title: Software Engineer Intern
bullets: Expanded payload functionality on the P3E system by implementing new features that enhanced configuration flexbility and system capability for automated pre-flight operations
Extended messaging architecture across embedded subsytems to support new payload behaviors
Updated user interfaces to integrate new payload options, streamlining operator interaction during pre-flight setup

job_ga_2.title: Software Engineer Intern
bullets: Enhanced the user interface for the Heads-Up Display for multiple ground control systems
Worked with Linux-based virtual machine envirionments to simulate system behavior and verify feature reliabiltiy
